hero.slide1_title: Secure Your Future with Our Society
hero.slide1_desc: Empowering communities with customized financial structures, high deposit returns, and professional co-operative values.
hero.slide2_title: Lowest Interest Rates on Gold Loans
hero.slide2_desc: Get instant cash disbursements in 30 minutes, stored within physical security vaults under CCTV surveillance.
hero.slide3_title: Modern Digital Banking at Your Fingertips
hero.slide3_desc: Manage savings, pay merchants with QR scan codes, and transfer funds instantly using our secure mobile application.
hero.trust2: Serving over 50,000+ satisfied members across Maharashtra

welcome.title: Pioneering Financial Security & Local Growth Since 1998
welcome.desc: We operate under state co-operative principles, catering to the financing requirements of families, retail traders, agricultural farmers, and micro enterprises. For over two decades, our Class "A" Audit certificate reflects absolute trust, security, and high dividend values for our members.
welcome.pillar1_desc: Guaranteed deposits and physical gold vaults.
welcome.pillar3_desc: Mobile banking app & scanner QR integration.

services.title: Comprehensive Financial Solutions
services.desc: Discover secure deposit options, instant gold-backed loans, and smart digital capabilities structured to fulfill your financial goals.

savings-account.title: Savings Account
savings-account.desc: Start saving with a low minimum balance and earn high returns with absolute deposit security.
features: Low minimum balance requirement of only ₹500.
Free SMS Alert service for instant transaction updates.

fixed-deposit.title: Fixed Deposits (FD)
fixed-deposit.desc: Maximize your returns on surplus funds with flexible tenures and guaranteed, secure growth.
features: Tenure options ranging from 15 days to 5 years.
Compounding option (quarterly/half-yearly) or monthly interest payouts.

recurring-deposit.title: Recurring Deposit (RD)
recurring-deposit.desc: Develop a systematic savings habit. Deposit a fixed amount monthly and earn high term interest.
features: Flexible monthly deposit starting from ₹500.
Tenures available from 12 months up to 60 months.

gold-loan.title: Instant Gold Loan
gold-loan.desc: Unlock the value of your gold jewelry and get instant cash at competitive interest rates with zero hassle.
features: Sanctioned within 30 minutes with instant cash/bank transfer.
High valuation of gold ornaments based on market rate.

home-loan.title: Home & Property Loan
home-loan.desc: Fulfill your dream of owning a home. We provide low-interest loans for house purchase, construction, or renovation.
features: Funding up to 80% of the property value.
Long repayment tenure up to 15 years.

business-loan.title: Business & Personal Loan
business-loan.desc: Boost your business working capital or cover immediate family expenses with quick disbursals.
features: Speedy evaluation and loan sanctioning.
Flexible repayment tenures from 12 to 60 months.

digital-banking.title: E-Services & Core Banking
digital-banking.desc: Enjoy modern digital banking services, including our safe mobile application, SMS alerts, and merchant QR codes.
features: Real-time funds transfer via IMPS and NEFT.
Interactive mobile app supporting balance checks and statements.

rates.fixed_deposit: Up to 9.5% p.a. (10.0% for Senior Citizens)

ticker.label: Updates
ticker.item1: 🔥 Special FD Interest Rates: Earn up to 9.5% p.a. and 10.0% p.a. for Senior Citizens!
ticker.item2: 🏆 Babasaheb Kavad Nighoj Nagari Sahakari Patsanstha is rated with prestigious Class 'A' Audit standing.
ticker.item3: 📱 New Mobile Banking application is now available for download on Google Play Store.
ticker.item4: 💼 Instant Gold Loans processed in just 30 minutes with secure physical vaults & low interest rates.
ticker.item5: 🏢 Visit our newly opened branches at Thane West and Ratnagiri Coast for personalized services.
ticker.item6: 🛡️ Your deposits are safe and secured under cooperative societies guidelines.

savings-account.title: Savings Account
savings-account.shortDesc: Start saving with a low minimum balance and earn high returns with absolute deposit security.
features: Low minimum balance requirement of only ₹500.
Free SMS Alert service for instant transaction updates.
Free RuPay ATM / Debit card for cash withdrawal and shopping.
Standing Instruction facility for automated transfers.

fixed-deposit.title: Fixed Deposits (FD)
fixed-deposit.shortDesc: Maximize your returns on surplus funds with flexible tenures and guaranteed, secure growth.
features: Tenure options ranging from 15 days to 5 years.
Compounding option (quarterly/half-yearly) or monthly interest payouts.
Loan facility available up to 90% of the deposit amount.
Premature withdrawal allowed under society regulations.

recurring-deposit.title: Recurring Deposit (RD)
recurring-deposit.shortDesc: Develop a systematic savings habit. Deposit a fixed amount monthly and earn high term interest.
features: Flexible monthly deposit starting from ₹500.
Tenures available from 12 months up to 60 months.
Ideal tool to accumulate funds for child's education, wedding, or vacations.
Automated standing instructions from savings account.

gold-loan.title: Instant Gold Loan
gold-loan.shortDesc: Unlock the value of your gold jewelry and get instant cash at competitive interest rates with zero hassle.
features: Sanctioned within 30 minutes with instant cash/bank transfer.
High valuation of gold ornaments based on market rate.
Safe and highly secure vault storage under CCTV surveillance.
Flexible repayment options: bullet repayment or monthly interest.

home-loan.title: Home & Property Loan
home-loan.shortDesc: Fulfill your dream of owning a home. We provide low-interest loans for house purchase, construction, or renovation.
features: Funding up to 80% of the property value.
Long repayment tenure up to 15 years.
No hidden administrative charges or penalty clauses.
Expert legal and technical evaluation support.

business-loan.title: Business & Personal Loan
business-loan.shortDesc: Boost your business working capital or cover immediate family expenses with quick disbursals.
features: Speedy evaluation and loan sanctioning.
Flexible repayment tenures from 12 to 60 months.
Repayable via easy monthly EMIs.
Guarantor facility based on member references.

digital-banking.title: E-Services & Core Banking
digital-banking.shortDesc: Enjoy modern digital banking services, including our safe mobile application, SMS alerts, and merchant QR codes.
features: Real-time funds transfer via IMPS and NEFT.
Interactive mobile app supporting balance checks and statements.
Personalized UPI QR code cards for shop owners.
Instant SMS updates for deposit maturity or loan payments.

safe-deposit.title: Safe Deposit Locker Vaults
safe-deposit.shortDesc: Keep your jewelry, land title deeds, and precious items safe in our state-of-the-art secure vaults.
features: Multiple locker sizes available (Small, Medium, Large).
Heavy duty physical steel safes and security systems.
CCTV-monitored locker room access with dual-key protection.
Nomination facility available.

footer.title: BABASAHEB KAVAD
footer.subtitle: Co-operative Patsanstha
footer.desc: Babasaheb Kavad Nighoj Nagari Sahakari Patsanstha is a trusted class-a audited co-operative financial institution committed to strengthening rural and urban communities since inception.
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: Co-operative Patsanstha deposits are subject to cooperative regulatory norms under state bylaws. Interest rates and dividend payouts are subject to change by decision of the board and society earnings audits. This portal provides institutional transparency for members.
footer.address: S.T. Stand, Nighoj–Parner Road, Nighoj, Tal. Parner, Dist. Ahmednagar

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with our customer service help desks, drop us an email, or submit an online inquiry using the form below.
contact.central_description: For any inquiries regarding account opening, gold loan evaluation, digital services, or institutional feedback, feel free to contact our head office desk or any of our regional branch offices.
contact.head_office_address: S.T. Stand, Nighoj–Parner Road, Nighoj, Tal. Parner, Dist. Ahmednagar
contact.map_description: Click the button below to view routing and maps directions to our head office location.
contact.form_description: Fill out the form below and our customer relationship desk will reach back to you shortly.
contact.privacy_note: Your information is safe with us. We do not share your details with third parties.
contact.success_message: Your inquiry has been submitted successfully.

social.title: Social Activities (CSR)
social.description: Cooperative banks do not just grow deposits; we grow communities. Read about our environmental and welfare initiatives.
social.activity1_description: Driving environmental protection through collective action. Our members, employees, and local students plant thousands of native neem, banyan, and peepal trees to support soil water table retention.
social.activity1_impact: Over 15,000+ trees planted and sustained with 90%+ survival rate.
social.activity2_description: Partnering with municipal blood centers to host donation drives that support local hospitals. We also organize complimentary physical health checkups, diabetic screenings, and eye clinics.
social.activity2_impact: More than 2,500 units of blood accumulated for public emergencies.
social.activity3_description: Distributing school uniforms, reference books, and tuition scholarships to children of farmers and lower-income families who display high academic achievement in local schools.
social.activity3_impact: Aided 5,000+ school students to continue higher secondary education.
social.activity4_description: Providing clean drinking water tankers to drought-affected rural villages. We also fund minor checks in streams to construct check-dams assisting rain water harvesting.
social.activity4_impact: Provided relief tanks to 45 villages during major water scarcity months.

videoGallery.description: Watch informative clips on how we manage credits, tutorials for mobile apps, and reports on audited compliance.
